title: bupleurum tenuissimum subsp. gracile
intro: Bupleurum tenuissimum subsp. gracile, also known as Gracile Thorny Bupleurum, is a perennial plant that belongs to the carrot family (Apiaceae). It is a type of medicinal herb that has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Bupleurum tenuissimum subsp. gracile include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and promoting digestive health, as well as having immunomodulatory effects to boost the immune system. In traditional herbal preparations, Bupleurum tenuissimum subsp. gracile can be found in teas, infusions, or combined with other herbs in formulae to treat various health conditions.
